use_cases: Full-page background for dark-themed landing pages
Hero section backdrop for premium SaaS products
Application wrapper background for fintech dashboards
Dark mode backgrounds for developer tools interfaces
Elegant backdrop for portfolio or creative agency sites
ai_summary: An elegant dark gradient background component featuring a radial gradient from dark gray to black with subtle cyan/blue streak effects. The streaks are created using skewed linear gradients with CSS masks, creating a sophisticated visual depth. Designed as a reusable full-page background pattern for premium dark-themed applications.
